options.b: Racial expressions, hand gestures and make-up are combined to symbolize certain epic or historic characters
options.c: Movements of body, face and hands are used to express oneself or to tell a story
options.d: A little smile, slightly curved waist and certain hand gestures are emphasized to express the feelings of love or eroticism

questions.subject: History & Culture
questions.question: Some Buddhist rock-cut caves are called Chaityas, while others are called Viharas. What is the difference between the two?

options.a: Vihara is a place of worship, while Chaitya is the dwelling place of the monks
options.b: Chaitya is a place of worship, while Vihara is the dwelling place of the monks
options.c: Chaitya is the stupa at the far end of the cave, while Vihara is the hall axial to it
options.d: There is no material difference between the two

questions.question: Consider the following Bhakti Saints: 1. Dadu Dayal 2. Guru Nanak 3. Tyagaraja Who among the above was/were preaching when the Lodi dynasty fell, and Babur took over?
microthemes: Indian Philosophy and Bhakti & Sufi Movements

questions.subject: History & Culture
questions.section: Indian Philosophy and Bhakti & Sufi Movements
questions.question: With reference to the history of philosophical thought in India, consider the following statements regarding Sankhya school: 1. Sankhya does not accept the theory of rebirth or transmigration of soul. 2. Sankhya holds that it is the self-knowledge that leads to liberation and not any exterior influence or agent. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
microthemes: Indian Philosophy and Bhakti & Sufi Movements

questions.question: Consider the following historical places: 1. Ajanta Caves 2. Lepakshi Temple 3. Sanchi Stupa Which of the above places is/are also known for mural paintings?
